narrative:
Bellbrook-Sugarcreek Local Sd (Greene) school district has 14,147 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.8% D−R vs -36.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
